mergeAttempt.reason: mock-env-main-divergence: github.com main SHA (8f40ad7) differs from local origin/main (518cc99); merge_pull_request returned 405 'Pull Request has merge conflicts'. Automation logic verified end-to-end up to this step; merge itself requires the local mock and github.com main to share history.

humanQuestions.question: Integrator needs a GitHub API channel to open PR for branch claude/assessment-agent-long-horizon-t2xNF (commit 10554d5). Neither mcp__github__* tools nor gh CLI are available. Please either (a) expose mcp__github__* tools to the integrator agent, or (b) open the PR manually and re-invoke integrator with the PR number.
humanQuestions.decision: Option (b) — driver opens PR directly via mcp__github__create_pull_request and feeds reviewer subagent the diff via a file path (prompt input). Subagent MCP schema exposure remains an open question for the integrator role; followed up as a separate task.
